action.reasoning: Observation: The 35M model with a 1D CNN and mean pooling achieved a new best spearman_rho of 0.6951. The CNN successfully learned local interaction motifs that generalize well to higher-order mutants. Analysis: We can likely improve this further by increasing the capacity of the CNN (3 layers, kernel size 7) to capture wider motifs, unfreezing one more layer of the ESM model (3 layers total) for better representations, and concatenating max pooling with mean pooling to capture both the average and the strongest motif signals. We will also train for 8 epochs since the model was still improving at epoch 6. Decision: Update model.py with the deeper CNN, max+mean pooling, and unfreeze 3 layers. Update train.py to train for 8 epochs. Submit for evaluation.
